history.text: Portuguese Timor appears in Timor-Leste's historical record.
Timor-Leste declared independence, a decisive step toward modern statehood.
Annexation by Indonesia changed control of the territory.
UNTAET administered the territory during the transition to independence.
Timor-Leste restored independence after a period of foreign rule, occupation or union.

worthSeeing.title: Atauro Island:
worthSeeing.text: Remote island with world-class diving reefs and traditional fishing villages.

worthSeeing.title: Mount Ramelau:
worthSeeing.text: Highest peak in Timor-Leste, pilgrimage destination with 180-degree views.

worthSeeing.title: Dili Waterfront:
worthSeeing.text: Relaxed capital with Portuguese colonial architecture and WWII-era rusting Japanese ships.
